DOĞUŞ UNIVERSITY INDOOR FOOTBALL TEAM IN THE QUARTERFINALS

Doğuş University, which has made a name for itself with its achievements in many sports branches, is ambitious in indoor football. Playing in the 2

nd

league of the tournament that is organized by Turkish University Sports Federation, our team won the game by 6-3 and secured a place in the quarterfinals.

We congratulate our invincible team of the last three matches and we wish them continued success.
